case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. OSCAR R. GUARJARDO GARCIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $83.00 - SERVED AUG-19-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, OSCAR R. GUARJARDO
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JAN-02-2019
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $685.46 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, OSCAR R. GUARJARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, OSCAR R. GUARJARDO $625.46 PRINCIPAL, $22.45 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $732.91, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $625.46 PLUS STATUTORY PREJUDGMENT INTEREST FROM 05/20/2018 (AND COSTS). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, OSCAR R. GUARJARDO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
